name: i_sheets_hinglish_connect_and_resume
notes: Hinglish-voice variant of the same real mint + auth-wait-gate pair (sheets_oauth.start_sheets_oauth / sheets_resume.maybe_resume_sheets_onboarding) — proves the connect flow and the honest not-yet-connected floor both work off a natural Hinglish phrasing, not just English. Setup: `setup --onboarded` then `script <tenant> i_sheets_hinglish_connect_and_resume.json`.

steps.message: Bhaiya mera customer aur sales ka sara data Google Sheet mein hai. Kaise jodu isse Viabe se?
steps.note: Hinglish connect-ask — expect the same real authorize_url mint despite the non-English phrasing.

steps.message: Haan, ho gaya, sheet connect kar diya maine
steps.note: Hinglish 'done' tokens (haan/ho/gaya are all in shopify_onboarding._DONE) hit the deterministic auth-wait floor — the gate's honest not-yet-connected line fires in the OWNER's language (Hinglish here), not a hardcoded English string. [2026-07-07: assert was the literal English 'don't see the connection', which the manager correctly never says in a Hinglish conversation — false-fail; the manager's actual reply ('...connection complete hua nahi dikh raha...') IS the honest not-yet-connected floor, just in Hinglish. Fixed to match the observed reply's own phrasing. Step 1's missing-authorize_url-link gap is UNRELATED and remains a real, separate finding — not touched by this fix.]
